title: Function Pipe
code: const pipe = <T>(...fns: ((x: T) => T)[]) => (x: T): T => fns.reduce((v, f) => f(v), x)
description: Creates a left-to-right function pipeline using rest parameters and `reduce`. Each function receives the output of the previous one. The generic `T` enforces that every function in the pipe shares the same input/output type.
